reasoning: The control AC-4(3) focuses on dynamic information flow control, which in a Kubernetes context can be mapped to network policies and secure communication configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce dynamic flow control by specifying ingress and egress rules. TLS enforcement for Ingress and mTLS in service mesh configurations ensure secure transport. API server secure transport policies ensure encrypted communication with the cluster.
